response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architecture and open-source contributions, but his title and experience level (Staff/Senior) far exceed the junior/mid-level role, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience with React/Node.js
Proven track record in scalable web platforms and open-source projects
Deep understanding of software architecture and testing practices
concerns: Overqualified with senior/staff titles, may not fit junior/mid-level role
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Diverse tech stack includes legacy/non-relevant tools (DLang, C++) that may indicate lack of focus
